sourceBeats.text: 雨夜里，女孩在巷口停下脚步，回头看见远处的霓虹灯下有人举起一把黑伞。

tasks.sourceBeat: 雨夜里，女孩在巷口停下脚步，回头看见远处的霓虹灯下有人举起一把黑伞。

storyboard.shotSize: establishing wide shot -> environmental detail shot
storyboard.cameraMove: slow observational drift, no dramatic shake
storyboard.composition: strong leading lines, protagonist small against architecture, one readable route deeper into the scene
storyboard.blocking: 女孩 is positioned as a scale reference; the environment performs the threat
storyboard.performance: minimal movement, alert posture, attention pulled by the abnormal light or sound
storyboard.lighting: cool blue ambience, practical white source, wet surfaces and soft reflections
storyboard.transition: carry the unresolved tension from 开场前状态 into a clearer spatial map
storyboard.framePurpose: build geography for later start/end frames so the video model does not invent the space

tasks.motion: 女孩完成这一条可见动作：雨夜里，女孩在巷口停下脚步，回头看见远处的霓虹灯下有人举起一把黑伞。 镜头只表现这个变化，不抢跑后续剧情。

mustKeep: 女孩 identity, face, hair, body shape, costume, and posture logic
巷口 scene layout, lighting direction, color palette, and screen direction

story state from the opening state

director storyboard: establishing wide shot -> environmental detail shot; strong leading lines, protagonist small against architecture, one readable route deeper into the scene; minimal movement, alert posture, attention pulled by the abnormal light or sound
